product_description_under_30_words: The original Sophie La Girafe natural rubber teether with soft chewable limbs and a gentle squeak, presented for early gumming when everything starts heading to the mouth.
ember_verdict: Mouthing ramps up hard at four to six months as gums get busy. Soft Sophie legs reach sore spots without hard plastic corners. Wipe clean only, and expect her to live in the changing bag. Keep sessions short and stay within arm reach on the floor.
rank_rationale: #1 over #2: deepest UK review proof and classic limb chew for this age.
why_it_fits: Iconic chew for this mouthing stage.
gift_note: Check they do not already own Sophie.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed dedicated gum relief first, steriliser/clean reality, brand diversity, review depth, then live UK buyability. Soft fabric companions ranked after true teethers.

product_description_under_30_words: A Matchstick Monkey silicone teether with easy grip arms and textured bumps for gums, dishwasher and steriliser friendly for the heavy mouthing stretch at this age.
ember_verdict: Parents who want dishwasher friendly teethers often bounce off Sophie wipe only rules. Matchstick Monkey bumps massage gums and the arms stay grabable when fists are still clumsy. Chill in the fridge if that helps your baby on a sore day.
rank_rationale: #2 over #3: steriliser-friendly silicone beats second Sophie shape for hygiene-led parents.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed dedicated gum relief first, steriliser/clean reality, brand diversity, review depth, then live UK buyability. Soft fabric companions ranked after true teethers.

product_description_under_30_words: A Sophie So Pure teething ring with sliding shapes and varied chew surfaces for babies who prefer a ring over a giraffe body when gums flare.
ember_verdict: Not every baby loves the classic giraffe shape. This ring keeps Sophie rubber feel with more textures to work along the gum line. Treat it as Sophie number two, not Sophie number three in the same changing bag basket this month.
rank_rationale: #3 over #4: clearer teether identity than a mixed gift pack.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed dedicated gum relief first, steriliser/clean reality, brand diversity, review depth, then live UK buyability. Soft fabric companions ranked after true teethers.

product_description_under_30_words: A Playgro Jungle Friends pack that includes three textured linking teethers alongside wrist and foot pieces, so you can rotate chews when one is in the wash.
ember_verdict: Teething weeks mean lost teethers under sofas. A pack with several chew links keeps a clean one ready without another emergency shop run. Start with the linking teethers on the mat before adding the soft foot pieces if hands are the main job today.
rank_rationale: #4 over #5: more chew pieces than a single clip rattle.

product_description_under_30_words: A Lamaze Flip Flap Dragon soft rattle with crinkly feet and a clip that flaps the wings, giving a mouthable soft toy when gums want fabric as well as rubber.
ember_verdict: Some babies chew fabric as hard as silicone. Flip Flap offers crinkle feet and a soft body when rubber teethers are rejected for an hour. Keep a proper silicone or rubber teether as the main gum tool beside it on the mat.
rank_rationale: #5: fabric chew companion ranked last behind dedicated teethers.
